concerns.text: Task T016 (Preprocess Phenotype) is marked [P] (parallel-safe) but explicitly depends on T009 (Synthetic Data) and T012a (Real Data Download). Since T012a has conditional logic (SSL error -> synthetic fallback), T016 cannot safely run in parallel with T012a without knowing the final data source. The [P] tag is incorrect; T016 must be sequential after T012a/T009 resolution.

Task T046 (Collinearity Guard) is marked [P] but depends on T016 (Phenotype Preprocessing) to produce `phenotypes_cleaned.fam`. Furthermore, T046 generates `model_config.yaml` which is a hard prerequisite for T017 (GWAS). T046 cannot run in parallel with T016 or T017. The [P] tag is invalid.

Task T017 (GWAS Execution) depends on T043 (Power Analysis) and T046 (Collinearity Guard) as execution gates. However, T017 is not explicitly ordered after T046 in the task list sequence (T046 appears after T016, T017 appears after T046, but T017 is listed before T022 which depends on it). More critically, T017 depends on `model_config.yaml` from T046. If T046 is marked [P] and runs in parallel with T017 (as implied by the 'Parallel Opportunities' section), T017 will fail due to missing input. The ordering must enforce T046 -> T017.

Task T022 (FDR Correction) depends on T017 (GWAS Raw Output). T022 is listed after T017, which is correct, but T022 is also marked [P] in the 'Parallel Opportunities' section context (implied by grouping). T022 cannot run in parallel with T017. The [P] tag on T022 (if applied) or the parallel execution strategy for US1 is flawed.

Task T021 (Threshold Sensitivity) depends on T020 (FDR Implementation). T021 is listed after T020, which is correct. However, T021 is marked [P] in the 'Parallel Opportunities' section. T021 cannot run in parallel with T020. The [P] tag is invalid.

Task T026 (Integration Test for PRS) depends on T016 (Phenotypes) and T022 (FDR Results). T026 is listed in Phase 5 (US3) but depends on artifacts from Phase 3 (US1) and Phase 4 (US2). While US3 is P3, the task T026 cannot be executed until T022 is complete. The current grouping implies US3 tasks can start after Foundational, but T026 specifically requires US2 output. This creates a hidden dependency violation if US3 is attempted in parallel with US2.

Task T032 (Annotation) depends on T022 (FDR Results). T032 is listed in Phase 5 (US3) but depends on US2 output. Similar to T026, this creates a hidden dependency if US3 is run in parallel with US2. The task list implies US3 is independent after Foundational, but T032 is not.

Task T047 (Runbook Generator) depends on T009, T013b, T014, T017, T022, T027, T028, T029, T030, T031. It is marked [P] but clearly depends on the completion of almost all other tasks. The [P] tag is completely invalid.
